## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user or developer value.

## Possible Implementation Notes

Optional: include API, UI, planner, or data-model ideas if you have them.

## Additional Context

Links, sketches, screenshots, or related issues.
